metadata.description: ArkaOS portable Agent Skills — Clean Code & SOLID-grade development practices, packaged for any Agent Skills runtime (Claude Code, Codex CLI, Cursor, VS Code Copilot, Atlassian, Figma).

plugins.name: arkaos-dev-skills
plugins.description: Ten outward-facing development skills from ArkaOS: framework-backed code review, TDD, runbooks, specs, DB design, security audit, clean-code review, API design, refactor planning, and architecture design. Generated by scripts/marketplace_export.py from the in-tree skills under departments/dev/skills/ (Angle-C from KB note 2026-04-25-agent-skills-open-standard).
